_comment: Config Registry — resolves each function ROLE to an engine binding at runtime. No vendor/model string ever appears in function code; code calls config_registry.resolve(role). Per Manmeet's confirmed decision (2026-07-01), all four roles bind to claude-fable-5. Transport is Vertex AI (AnthropicVertex, GCP ADC). Editing THIS file is the only place engine choice lives. NOTE: claude-fable-5 requires 30-day data retention (not ZDR) and must be enabled in the project's Vertex Model Garden; if it is not yet enabled the model call surfaces a real Vertex error (no fallback stub).
